title: artemisia gansuensis var. gansuensis
intro: Artemisia gansuensis var. gansuensis, also known as Gansu wormwood, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and antipyretic activities, derived from the sesquiterpene lactone artemisinin. The health benefits of Gansu wormwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Artemisia gansuensis var. gansuensis can be prepared as an herbal infusion or used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
